_comment: R-T2 beat-one feasibility ghosts (Session 4B.3b). Per-op overrides that FORCE the CU3 contradiction cases against the canned beat-two (sandbox.json). Ops without an entry synthesize a ghost from their sandbox entry (feasible + placement, no money). The `contradiction` hint is interpreted by the fixture server: `infeasible` = beat one feasible while beat two returns no_verdict; `moved` = beat one feasible but the placement start shifted materially from beat two's pin (the frontend relocation code-path proof — a real exact-pin backend cannot relocate a pinned op between beats, so this exercises the frontend, docs/04).
